message:
fix: ensure consistent cursor spacing to prevent option jumping

Addresses toggle jumping issue by ensuring cursor takes consistent space:

Spacing Fix:
- Reduce baseIndent to 3 spaces to accommodate 1-character cursor
- Both " " (unfocused) and ">" (focused) are exactly 1 character
- Total indentation remains 4 characters: 3 spaces + 1 cursor
- sprintf format ensures consistent positioning

This should prevent options from jumping left when selected
by maintaining exact same character positioning whether focused or not.
